title: Yuck! Book

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
"yuck" on one switch 
"yum" on the other
sections.middleText2: the book Yuck! by Brita Granstrom and Mick Manning

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Use switches to complete repeated lines of Yuck! book. 
2. Begin reading the book. 
3. Model switch use on the first repeated line "a wriggly worm, tugged out of the lawn? That's not our baby's dinner!" (Yuck)
4. Continue reading and pause so the switch user can fill in the gap.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to say the repeated line in the book
